title: Mansion Redux
description: An overhaul of the woodland mansion bringing it up to date
body:
# Mansion Redux
**A mansion overhaul datapack which brings the woodland mansion up to date with several major changes to it**

### Changes
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- _Overhauled the generation system, varied shapes and layouts_
- _Big changes to the room variety_
- _More focus on the illager, remove the spawning of other hostile mobs in the mansion so the experience can focus on the illagers_

</details>



**This pack doubles as tech demo of multiple techniques in structure generation for datapacks it features**

### Datapack tricks used
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- _A system to generate outer walls regardless of the shape and layout of the overall structure_
- _Loot placement all dependent on coded rules_
- _Rooms composed of multiple pieces and rules to give block variety_
- _Base supports that stretches down similar to the old prior to jigsaw structures (this have been in used by DnT for over a year)_

</details>



Regardless of the datapack being more of a tech demo for myself, I made sure to keep it fun and refreshing to play with
